why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_destruction must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and breaker id, BlockPos, and progress body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not block break animation semantics, entity existence, client world state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test cannot compile because Packet::PlayBlockDestructionClientbound does not exist, and the current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has no official packet id 0x05 block_destruction entry.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
